headings.text: Mera Sound Sconce: A New Approach to Light and Sound
Mera Sound Sconce: A New Approach to Light and Sound
Designed to Be a Statement, Not an Afterthought
High-Quality Sound With Warm, Dimmable Light
Custom Finishes for a Natural Look

bodyText: MenuHomeServicesBrandsPortfolioAboutExciting PRoductsContactHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingMera Sound Sconce: A New Approach to Light and SoundPosted on March 5, 2025Mera Sound Sconce: A New Approach to Light and SoundGreat sound should be seen and heard.The new Mera Sound Sconce combines high-performance audio with soft, dimmable lighting, adding both ambiance and immersive sound to your space.Designed in collaboration with Mera Studio Architects, this wall-mounted speaker redefines how technology and design come together in the home.‚Äç‚ÄçDesigned to Be a Statement, Not an AfterthoughtUnlike traditional speakers that blend into the background, the Mera Sound Sconce is designed to be seen. With its artisan-crafted aluminum shell and custom-knit boucl√© grille, it functions as both a sculptural lighting fixture and a high-fidelity speaker. According to Tara Marshall, Principal at Mera Studio Architects, the goal was to create a piece that transforms a room, not just with sound but with light:‚ÄúAll too often, speakers are the last element considered in a space. We wanted to rethink the speaker and come up with a design that would shift the concept of the speaker from an afterthought to a forethought.‚Äù‚Äç‚ÄçHigh-Quality Sound With Warm, Dimmable LightBeyond its modern aesthetic, the Mera Sound Sconce delivers impressive full-range audio with 3‚Äù ultra-thin woofers and 25mm cloth-dome tweeters. The integrated LED lighting, designed in partnership with American Lighting, provides both direct and indirect illumination, creating a soft glow behind the speaker grille and the shell.Custom Finishes for a Natural LookAvailable in **three hand-selected colorways‚ÄîLinen, Black Sand, and Clay‚Äî**each finish was inspired by natural textures and tones. Whether you‚Äôre designing a minimalist space or a warm, inviting environment, the Mera Sound Sconce blends beautifully with different aesthetics.‚Äç‚ÄçDesigned for Any HomeWhether you're building a new home or upgrading your current space, the Mera Sound Sconce is available for both new construction and retrofit installations. It also integrates with smart home automation systems, including Lutron, Control4, and Savant, making it easy to incorporate into your existing setup.Available NowThe Mera Sound Sconce is available as a single unit, a pair, or bundled with the Sonos Amp for a complete, high-performance setup. If you're looking for a sophisticated way to add both light and sound to your home, this speaker offers a seamless blend of form and function.‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçIf you are interested in scheduling for one of our professional engineers to meet with you or your interior designer for your remodel or new construction project in Palm Desert or rest of the Coachella Valley, we may be reached at:Phone: (760) 799-0881Email: Sales@AVIR.comAsk for Charley or Yasin.‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçServices:Home CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworking‚ÄçProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca Valley ‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚Äç‚ÄçEngage the expertsAVIR operates within the Coachella Valley region, providing exclusive smart automation services for residential and commercial properties.Call760.779.0881Visit our Showroom41905 Boardwalk, Suite XPalm Desert, CA 92211NavigationHomeServicesBrandsExciting ProductsPortfolioAboutCareersContactServicesHome CinemaAutomationLightingShadingMusicSecurityNetworkingExciting ProductsBrowse some of the most exclusive products we can bring to your next technology installation.Find out moreProudly serving the entire Coachella Valley and surrounding areas:BanningBeaumontBermuda DunesBig BearCathedral CityCoachellaIdyllwildIndian WellsIndioJoshua TreeLa QuintaLake ArrowheadMoreno ValleyMurrietaPalm DesertPalm SpringsRancho MirageRedlandsRiversideSan BernardinoTemeculaThermalThousand PalmsYucaipaYucca ValleyCopyright ¬© 2023.
